text_excerpt: Contact | Mark Pritchard Skip to main content Mark Pritchard MP The Wrekin Main navigation Home About Mark News About The Wrekin Campaigns In Parliament Contact Mark Pritchard MP The Wrekin Contact Leave this field blank Constituency Office 25 Church Street, Wellington, TF1 1DG 01952 256 080 [email protected] Mark Pritchard on Facebook Mark Pritchard on Twitter First Name Last Name Postcode Address id Address 1 Email Mobile number Message I would like to be kept up-to-date by the Conservatives on future issues that matter to me: Yes There will be an easy way to opt out of future messages. For more information on how we handle your data and your rights, please see our Privacy Policy . Volunteer for us In which of these ways can you help us? Delivering a few leaflets locally now and again Helping with office and admin tasks Making calls to voters and volunteers Joining our canvassing team to knock on doors Potentially standing to be a local Conservative Councillor Becoming a Digital Ambassador By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy . By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.
